key_decisions.description: Roll out attribution expansion test — flat as expected, data science approved
Analytics Agent integration into QBO Omni — shared plan doc and process, following Omni's existing onboarding pattern
Skills deduplication resolved — Omni has existing dedup process for mc_insights_skill, no custom solution needed
Agent discoverability entry point: homepage (low intent, 70% L2A) vs reporting pages (high intent) — homepage approach validated
Deliverability insights: email bounce reasons should come from CDP, following existing SMS bounce reason pattern
Consolidate MPR via QB BI meetings — merge Weekly OpMech and KPI Requirements into single session
key_decisions.related_priority: Marketing Performance Reporting via QB BI

key_decisions.description: Email Report Reimagine ecomm tab: don't hide tab when no store connected, use zero state to promote connection instead
Comparative→Custom Reports segments: max 2 segments, 30-day default date range, campaigns load first then spin segment metrics
Classic Automations reporting must be fixed — 100k users, $13M MRR, automations team won't migrate
QBO financial data not addressed in Q4 work — needs its own strategy, bigger than messaging
key_decisions.related_priority: Marketing Performance Reporting via QB BI

key_decisions.description: Revenue naming aligned: standardized 'Revenue' vs 'Gross Sales' definitions across all report surfaces
MVT campaigns need separate treatment in Custom Reports — REPORTING-9875 filed with plan
Click Performance/Click Map zero state inconsistencies OK for canary launch, must be consistent before full ramp
WhatsApp reporting funnel metrics: Delivered → Read → Clicked (Read metric only when available from API)
QA timeline pushed back from 13 days to 8 days — challenged eng estimate and won shorter cycle
Rolled back canary release after catching last-minute Click Map bug — re-releasing next day with fix

open_questions.description: ECS tracking needed for 'Continue' button in email report zero state — not yet implemented
Multivariate Report DFAD — no date yet, Morgan asked but no answer from eng
WhatsApp beta release timing — depends on bug prioritization responsiveness from eng
VOC synthesis process not yet formalized in PM staff meetings
CHEQ IP Feeds — is the team ingesting the feeds? Vendor following up, no response yet
StarRocks join query bugs blocking Tiger Team backend schema updates
Marketing Dashboard Multivariate test consolidation approach TBD — how to merge variants into single grouped item
